fullText:
2-year-old:  

“Everybody always goes buh-bye.

[10-year-old] goes to school.

[8-year-old] goes to school.

[5-year-old] goes to school.

I play with mom.”

Me: “What about dad?”

2-year-old: “Dad goes fishing.”
